antiPatterns.statement: Do not dump policy, methodology, persona, and routing rules into a single giant always-on file.
Do not stuff prompts or agents with full procedural playbooks when a skill should carry the method.
Do not reward wording that sounds authoritative if it does not specify inputs, boundaries, and verification expectations.
Do not over-privilege agents or allow generic fallback helpers to perform specialist phases that require bounded roles.
Do not publish workspace-specific context, private paths, or repository descriptions into a public cache, even when the conclusion itself looks useful.
